title: lepisorus sinensis
intro: Lepisorus sinensis, also known as Chinese ladder fern, is a type of fern native to China, characterized by its unique ladder-like fronds. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Lepisorus sinensis has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its potential to reduce inflammation and improve lung function. In herbal preparations, Lepisorus sinensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make tonics and capsules.
